posts.author: guddu (Abhishek)
posts.cookedHtml:
Does anyone run into the issue of generating summarizes from boards or board items ?
Say i want to describe the entire board or some items into a proper reporting structure using a specified description tone. It can then be used for emails too.

What other paint point do you encounter while aiming to summarize your board or board items ?
